sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thupha khuavak mual sang tung ah
Zan khuamial hong liah ma in
Mai nawt in ah kuan un
Mual kawm sang a galte sim ding
Tha neih teng siit kei ni
thei hi lei tung zawh na ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Upna in zawhna hi upna in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A thu tem bang zang in
A zosa mi siangte’ khap mah
Sihna zo tua upna mah tawh, eite i

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I ziat, i vei i kiimkot ah
Pai un do ding kuan un
Hot khiatna lukhu khu in ah
Lei liing ding hi i khe nuai-ah,
I aw’n mual thawn ding hi.
